title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 48
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost cap.
questions.audio_script: Man: Did you find your cap? You sounded worried this morning. || Woman: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the park, because I remembered playing football after lunch. || Man: And did you check the shop counter? You were there later. || Woman: I did, but it was not there. Then my lifeguard called and said [1]my cap was beside the swimming pool[/1]. I must have left it there without thinking. || Man: Good. You would need it today. || Woman: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you find your cap? You sounded worried this morning.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the park, because I remembered playing football after lunch.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: And did you check the shop counter? You were there later.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I did, but it was not there. Then my lifeguard called and said my cap was beside the swimming pool. I must have left it there without thinking.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good. You would need it today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

questions.question: Where is the cap?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, cap on grass in a park, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, cap beside an indoor swimming pool, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, cap on a shop counter, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says my cap was beside the swimming pool.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are we still going to visit the market this afternoon? I was looking forward to it. || Woman: I don't think so. Most stalls shut early, so that plan will not work. || Man: We could walk on the beach instead. || Woman: I checked, but the wind is very strong. My cousin suggested another idea, and [1]we are visiting an art gallery after school[/1]. || Man: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet? || Woman: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together. || Woman: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

dialogue.text: Are we still going to visit the market this afternoon? I was looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I don't think so. Most stalls shut early, so that plan will not work.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: We could walk on the beach instead.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I checked, but the wind is very strong. My cousin suggested another idea, and we are visiting an art gallery after school.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about the charity run.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What do we need to take for the charity run tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much. || Man: The teacher said we do not need to bring a warm jumper, because they have enough for everybody. || Woman: What about a camera? || Man: No, not this time. The important thing is this: [1]bring a water bottle because there are no drinks until the finish[/1]. || Woman: Thanks. I will put it in my bag tonight. || Man: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What do we need to take for the charity run tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: The teacher said we do not need to bring a warm jumper, because they have enough for everybody.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about a camera?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: No, not this time. The important thing is this: bring a water bottle because there are no drinks until the finish.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food in a café.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Have you decided what to get for lunch? The queue is moving quickly. || Man: I first thought about green salad, but I had salad at lunch. || Woman: The chicken noodles looks good too. || Man: Maybe, but they are too spicy. I think [1]I will have the jacket potato because it has beans on top[/1]. || Woman: Good choice. I will order after you. || Man: Great, then we can find a table near the window before it gets busy. || Man: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

dialogue.speaker: woman

dialogue.speaker: man

dialogue.speaker: woman

dialogue.speaker: man

questions.context: You hear a school announcement about the eco club.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: This is a message for students joining the eco club today. Please do not go to the school garden, because the ground is too wet. Some students may wait by the science lab, but there is a test there. The teacher has changed the room for today only. [1]Everyone should go straight to the geography room after lunch[/1]. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: This is a message for students joining the eco club today. Please do not go to the school garden, because the ground is too wet. Some students may wait by the science lab, but there is a test there. The teacher has changed the room for today only. Everyone should go straight to the geography room after lunch. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the castle.
questions.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the castle tomorrow? I thought you were going to take the train. || Woman: I was, but the station is too far away. || Man: Could you use the bus instead? || Woman: I checked, but it arrives after the tour starts. [1]I am going to take the coach because the school has booked one for us[/1]. || Man: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Woman: Great. I will send a message if I am late. || Woman: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about work in a garden centre.
questions.audio_script: Girl: What are you doing at the garden centre this afternoon? I thought the manager asked you to water plants. || Boy: Not now, because it rained this morning. || Girl: So will you move heavy pots? || Boy: No, we need two people for that. The manager said [1]my job today is to sort the seed packets[/1]. || Girl: That sounds clear enough. || Boy: Yes, and it should not take too long if the shop stays quiet. I can help you afterwards. || Boy: That should make the rest of the day much easier.
